candidate_pool.title: Messenger Bag for Laptop Vintage Canvas Leather Crossbody Satchel Shoulder Computer Bag Travel Office Messenger Bag
candidate_pool.text: Title: Messenger Bag for Laptop Vintage Canvas Leather Crossbody Satchel Shoulder Computer Bag Travel Office Messenger Bag Categories: Electronics > Computers & Accessories > Laptop Accessories > Bags, Cases & Sleeves > Messenger & Shoulder Bags Description: Carrying your stuff on-the-go couldn't be easier with this vintage style canvas and leather messenger bag. The strap is adjustable to provide comfort and can accomdate anyone regardless of their size. With four external pockets, you can carry and load your smartphone, wallet and other valuable items. With a large internal compartment, it's perfect for small to medium sized notebooks or tablets. There's also a compartment under the main flap to store other items. All flaps lock into place with magnetic buttons. This messenger bag is perfect for, business professionals and/or travelers trying to make a fashion statement.

The central pin ( yellow color ) is used for composite video data. Our RCA cord is a perfect match for both residential and commercial use as we offer different cable sizes, starting with 3 feet long and reaching up to 100 feet long. Regardless of the size, the selected cable will be a perfect cost-effective option. Every audio/video RCA cord we sell is covered with a durable PVC jacket to protect it from unwanted bending damage and to increase its durability. Moreover, gold-plated connectors will resist oxidation and serve much longer. Enjoy the clarity of the sound and picture without any distortion and signal loss, even at extended lengths. candidate_pool.title: Amphenol AV-THLIN2BNCM-002.5 Thin-line BNC Coaxial Cable, BNC Male to BNC Male, 2.5', Black
candidate_pool.text: Title: Amphenol AV-THLIN2BNCM-002.5 Thin-line BNC Coaxial Cable, BNC Male to BNC Male, 2.5', Black Categories: Electronics > Television & Video > Accessories > Cables > Coaxial Cables Description: This low-profile thin-line (RG179) coaxial cable assembly features a much smaller diameter than standard RG59, allowing greater installation flexibility. Despite its small size, the proper 75 ohm impedance is maintained to ensure optimal signal transfer. These fully shielded cables feature molded BNC connector terminations for strain relief purposes. Ideal for short runs, these cables are excellent for connecting video displays, processors, and amplifiers with BNC type jacks.
